privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic healthcare task in Oscar EMR (Canadian open-source electronic medical record system). The task involves reassigning a clinical reminder tickler for synthetic patient Alice Tasker. The tickler initially contains the message 'MRI Brain Results - Abnormal' and is incorrectly assigned to provider 999997 (Locum Doctor). The task requires reassigning it to provider 999998 (Dr. Sarah Chen), escalating the priority from Normal to High, while keeping the task status as Active (A). All provider names and patient data are synthetically generated for this simulation task. Login credentials are username 'oscardoc', password 'oscar', PIN '1117'.
